title: Hi, need some help
excerpt: I just posted a request to @mossier about automation and I dont know if you can help.  I do not seem to have the ability to robustly build out a automation template.  My choices are super limited.

posts.author: derek.greer (Derek)
posts.cookedHtml: I just posted a request to @mossier about automation and I dont know if you can help. I do not seem to have the ability to robustly build out a automation template. My choices are super limited.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Derek,

Are you able to elaborate on how limited your choices are so I can get a better understanding of what’s happening here? Are you attempting to build out a custom automation? Thanks
